notes: Twaron — Teijin Aramid para-aramid spall liner. Similar to Kevlar but with slightly lower tensile (3.2 GPa). Density 1.44 g/cm³. RHAe ~0.18-0.25 per mm vs fragments. Used as lighter/cheaper alternative to Kevlar in vehicle spall liners. Better UV resistance than Kevlar.

source.methodology: RHAe from published ballistic test data on Twaron fabric vs fragments, normalized to RHA. Tensile strength per Teijin specification.
